reason:
Agent attempted to retrieve GitHub username using the GitHub tool but failed due to a proxy authentication error (502 "Failed to fetch access token")
  Bugs found:
    - GitHub OAuth token retrieval failed with 502 error from api.github.com/user proxy call, preventing username verification. The agent successfully processed the request and granted account access, but the underlying GitHub proxy service returned "Failed to fetch access token" error, making it impossible to retrieve the authenticated username.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully with SuperAgent application
Clicked agent "QA-20260505-193217-h8f0" from sidebar - Agent detail view opened, showing idle status
Verified agent status - Status shown as "idle" which meets requirement (running or idle acceptable)
Typed message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." - Message entered in input field
Clicked Send button - Message sent, session created, agent began working
Account Access Request card appeared - Card showed GitHub account already connected and selected
Clicked "Allow Access (1)" button - Permission granted, agent continued processing
API Request Review card appeared for GET /user - Clicked Allow to grant API permission
Permission dialog shown - Clicked "Allow Once" to confirm API access
Second API Request Review card appeared - Clicked Allow again for additional API call
Second permission dialog shown - Clicked "Allow Once" to confirm
Third API Request Review card appeared - Clicked Allow for final API call
Third permission dialog shown - Clicked "Allow Once" to confirm
Waited for agent response - Agent completed after 1m 2s with error message

Took screenshot of final state - Response shows 502 proxy error instead of GitHub username. Error message states: "The GitHub account is connected, but the proxy returned a 502 'Failed to fetch access token' when calling `api.github.com/user`"
bugs: GitHub OAuth token retrieval failed with 502 error from api.github.com/user proxy call, preventing username verification. The agent successfully processed the request and granted account access, but the underlying GitHub proxy service returned "Failed to fetch access token" error, making it impossible to retrieve the authenticated username.
